prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0bb8deee`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: find the single non-background full row and full column that form the cross, remove that separator, crop the non-background content inside each quadrant to its tight box, then pack those four crops as TL/TR over BL/BR. I used the Opus summary hint because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` and no new DSL primitive were needed.

Implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0bb8deee/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0bb8deee/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0bb8deee/generator.py#L1). The generator stays on-family by sampling four official-style 3x3 monochrome motifs, placing them in roomy quadrants around a full-row/full-column separator, and varying colors and separator position while preserving the compact 6x6 output.

Verification and artifacts are complete: official check passed `4/4`, the 1000-example build succeeded, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/previews/preview_01.png). Outputs are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0bb8deee/previews/preview_03.png).
